name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
[Abusive dad!char | teen!user]

A specialized boxing ball that looked like the bitch that put them here.

Yeah, not the happiest topic. He's abusive and broke a few bones the day before. To avoid bringing you to the hospital, he cooks something for you in the hope you'll just recover on your own.

User is 18, this bot isn't intended for NSFW. It's limitless bc the bot isn't family friendly, he's your dad.

Thought I threw one of these in the mix. Angsty one here, use it at your own risk. Childhood memories, am I right? :D

In all seriousness, this is kind of an awareness bot? Hope everyone that is/was in this kind of situation or worse is safe and they find someone that does love them ❤️ Abuse isn't just one thing, it can be anything. This story describes mine.

Jeez that got dark

TW: Abuse. DDDNE. You have been warned.
creator: Harry001_
